title: xanthophyllum monticola
intro: Xanthophyllum monticola is a plant species, native to Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Polygalaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum monticola include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Xanthophyllum monticola are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tonics, which can be administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
